title: crotalaria depressa
intro: Crotalaria depressa, also known as the hairy rattle pod, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in Africa, to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Crotalaria depressa include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Crotalaria depressa may include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
